title: E2E: quality gate — all-features build, clippy, hack, typos
description: Full quality gate after all implementation beads close. Run in order: (1) cargo fmt --all and check nothing changed, (2) typos src/ across all crates, (3) cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings, (4) cargo hack check --feature-powerset --no-dev-deps, (5) cargo test --all-features, (6) RUSTDOCFLAGS='--cfg docsrs -D warnings' cargo +nightly doc --no-deps --all-features. All must pass clean.
